name: Black Sapphire Club ( with Apartment )
description: The Black Sapphire is RESTORED and BETTER THAN EVER! I added an AV Landing pad and Walkway to get to the front of the Club along with adding Fountains, Holo Waterfalls, Vending Machines Tables and Security. Inside the Casino NPCs are Seated, Standing and at the Bar. In the back are the Blackjack/Roulette Tables!
